rationale.rule: A block whose plurality-layer is a named wall layer (W1/W2/벽체) and whose entities on that layer are short orthogonal LINE segments paired with matching CEN centerlines is a wall-bearing plan fragment, transferable to any drawing using the same CEN+W-layer convention.

rationale.uncertainty: Only 30 of 102 entities are sampled, so it cannot be confirmed the W1 lines close into a fully continuous perimeter loop or whether any W1 segments actually belong to a non-wall fixture that happens to share the layer.
